title: Senegalia giganticarpa
taxonomy: Senegalia giganticarpa is classified as a species of tree in the family Fabaceae. It is native to Australia and is also known as Acacia giganticarpa. This tree species has been reclassified from the genus Acacia to Senegalia as part of the ongoing process of taxonomic revision. The reclassification was made based on molecular and morphological studies that showed the tree's closer affinity to other species in the Senegalia genus. As a result, Senegalia giganticarpa is now recognized as a distinct species within this genus.
